title: Loporeon [Cobblemon]
description: This datapack adds Loporeon to your world! Loporeon is the new Normal/Water type addition to your Cobblemon experience.
body:
As of Cobblemon 1.3.1+, battling now works with fakemons so you are now able to battle to your hearts content!

This datapack/resource pack brings Loporeon to the world! The normal/water fakemon!

All instructions for installation are included in the readme.txt that can be found in the folder included with this addon.

=-=-=-=-=  
Base Stats:  
HP:100  
Attack:100  
Defence:81  
Sp. Att:82  
Sp. Def:85  
Speed:100  
=-=-=-=-=

=-=-=-=-=  
Abilities:  
Water Absorb  
Scrappy  
(Hidden)Huge Power  
=-=-=-=-=

!!AS OF Cobblemon 1.3.0 the battling for fakemon is broken so it cannot battle but can still be spawned into the world!!

Can only be spawned into the world by commands only as of right now.

All and all, if you have any feedback for me, please reach out to me and let me know. I'm learning and growing as I go!

You can contact me on discord: Maru#0209

All assets/models/textures/files/animations (Everything) was made by me. Please be nice to my stuff :( I am very nice and friendly so I will not stop you from doing things with this addon. The only requirement is that you ask me permission before you add this to a server, monitize off of it, or anything in that sense.
